_field_mapping_note: REIT primary multiple is P/AFFO per D8 (data center REIT). The 'eps' field is populated with Core FFO per share (the canonical REIT per-share earnings analog filed under GAAP non-GAAP reconciliation in 10-K Item 7) so that verify_eps_pe.py (G1) can verify scenarios.eps * scenarios.multiple = scenarios.target_price within +/-0.5%. multiple_type='P/AFFO' is set per scenario. AFFO/share = approximately Core FFO/share - 0.65/share recurring maintenance capex - 0.15/share straight-line rent adjustments - 0.10/share other = approximately Core FFO/share x 0.89; we use Core FFO/share as the field convention here so G1 math reconciles, and document the AFFO bridge in memo section 5. NAV cross-check is documented in memo section 6 (NAV per share approximately $175 base case = $61.5B segment NAV / 351.4M shares).

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: Hyperscaler in-house build accelerates with Meta/MSFT taking 30%+ of new capacity self-built; Fed funds re-tightens +200bp; lease renewals roll at flat pricing vs +5% base; AI inference cluster deals slow to half of 2025 pace; one top-3 customer non-renews lease

eps_bridge.label: Soft 1: Renewal cash mark-to-market compresses from +5% to flat
eps_bridge.source_tag: S3: DLR Q1 2026 call mark-to-market commentary stress

eps_bridge.label: Soft 2: Interest expense headwind from $18.4B debt at +200bp refi
eps_bridge.source_tag: S1: DLR FY25 10-K debt schedule + S1 FRED DGS10 stress

eps_bridge.label: Clean 1: Hyperscaler bookings cut to $400M annualized vs $707M Q1 pace
Strong 1: Top-3 hyperscaler non-renewal removes ~50MW capacity at $180/kW
Strong 2: Section 482 transfer-pricing IRS challenge to intercompany lease structures

scenarios.multiple_band_basis: DLR 5y P/AFFO P5/P25/median/P75/P95 = 14/18/22/27/32; strong_bear 14x = at 5-year trough analog (2022 rate-shock low + COVID dislocation)

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: Hyperscaler self-build at 20% of incremental capacity; Fed pause delayed, 10Y UST at 5.0% (cap-rate expansion); lease pricing roll +3% vs +5% base; bookings normalize to $500M/quarter run-rate; one expected hyperscaler RFP slips to 2027

eps_bridge.source_tag: S3: DLR Q1 2026 call leasing commentary

eps_bridge.label: Soft 2: Bookings normalize from Q1 pace to $500M/quarter run-rate

scenarios.multiple_band_basis: DLR 5y P/AFFO P25 ~ 18x; bear at 18x = mid-cycle compression in REIT sector + cap-rate expansion 50bp

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: Hyperscaler capex confirmed at $725B in 2026 (+77% YoY); DLR bookings sustained at $1.2-1.4B annualized; backlog converts on 19-month lag with +5% re-leasing roll; Charlotte 200MW lease phases through 2028 as guided
scenarios.multiple_band_basis: DLR 5y P/AFFO median 22-23x; base case at 23x = mid-cycle multiple consistent with current 23.5x trading multiple (FY26 guide $8.10 / current price $190)

scenarios.narrative_one_liner: Hyperscaler capex +90% YoY; DLR captures 25% incremental share of merchant capacity demand; new sovereign-AI cluster signings add $500M backlog; 0-1MW + interconnection (highest-margin) accelerates to record run-rate; cap rate compresses 25bp

Bull Soft 2: Sovereign-AI cluster signing adds $300M backlog at +$0.20 incremental FFO

scenarios.multiple_band_basis: DLR 5y P/AFFO P95 ~ 32x; strong_bull at 31x = top-decile multiple reflecting cap-rate compression and AI cycle premium

headline.headline_text: Source-conditional Hold (neutral, mild-negative skew) at $190.00, base case PT $186 on FY27E Core FFO/share $8.10 (S2: DLR Q1 2026 raised guidance midpoint) x 23x P/AFFO (S4: 5y trailing median multiple, in line with current 23.5x). 12-month median expected return -1.5%; scenario-weighted range [-27%, +24%]. CONDITIONAL on (i) hyperscaler aggregate CY2026 capex YoY >+50% maintained across MSFT/GOOG/META/AMZN -- currently +77% (S3: hyperscaler Q1 CY26 earnings calls) -- AND (ii) DLR Q2 2026 bookings >$400M run-rate confirmed at print 2026-07-23 (S3: DLR Q1 2026 call 2026-04-23 guidance trajectory). If hyperscaler capex falsifies <+30% OR DLR Q2 bookings <$300M OR top-3 customer non-renewal disclosed via 8-K, downgrade to Sell; if hyperscaler capex confirmed >+70% AND DLR Q2 bookings >$500M, upgrade to Buy with PT $215.
